title: diplazium pallidum
intro: Diplazium pallidum, also known as pale shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diplazium pallidum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and made into tea, or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
